form.formComment: Chasing a hat-trick. Comes off a 29 day let-up. Most recently favourite; won by a nose at Toowoomba Bm70 March 14 over 1300m defeating The Deputy carrying 58.5kg at $2.45. The start before that favourite; came from midfield and won by 1.2 len at Toowoomba Cl3-Sw March 7 over 1200m defeating Snitzond carrying 60kg at $5. Rates highly and can feature in the finish.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2.5). Chasing a hat-trick. Comes off a 29 day let-up. previousStarts.stewardsComment: For a short distance near the 1100m, carried in by Snitzond.
Raced wide throughout.
Began awkwardly.

form.formComment: At the latest run set the pace for much of the race 2nd of 10 at Doomben Bm70 on April 1 over 1200m, on a slow track; 0.5 len behind Eye Of The Eagle with 56.5kg at $6. Before that struggled in the run home; ran last of 11 at Gold Coast Military Rose on March 14 over 1200m, on a slow track; 9 len behind Considered carrying 55.5kg at $61. Went close last time. Expected to be very competitive again.

form.formComment: First-up. Finished off last preparation second in a small field at this track Cl4 December 5 over 1800m, a nose behind Ionaceltic carrying 57kg at $10. When resuming last campaign fourth of 10 at Dalby Bm60 April 8 2025 over 1400m, soft track; 2.75 len behind Executive Stress carrying 59kg at $12. Will improve on whatever he does in this.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. First-up ran on from midfield and won by a long-neck at Ipswich Cg&E Cl1 February 12 over 1100m defeating Roaring Success with 60kg at $2.70. Last start raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 2nd of 9 at Ipswich Cl2 on March 20 over 1100m, 1.4 len behind Acapulco Girl carrying 59.5kg at $4.60. Can improve. Big chance.

form.formComment: Most recently favourite; won by a nose at Eagle Farm F&M Bm65 March 25 over 1200m defeating Esprit Du Jour with 59.5kg at $3.80. The race before that favourite; tracked the speed and boxed on steadily; won by 4 len at this track Cl2 March 13 over 1100m in heavy going defeating A Touch From Fayt carrying 55.5kg at $12. Looks a good race for her and she is sure to be highly competitive again.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after four months 4th of 7 at Toowoomba Cl3 on March 14 over 1000m, 2 len behind Blantons Run with 59kg at $2.60. Might need one more.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after seven months favourite; won by 1.5 len at Ipswich Cl2 March 26 over 1100m defeating Daitanna with 57kg at $3.30. Previously second-up second last of 11 at Sapphire Coast Bm66 on June 8 over 1212m, slow going 12 len behind Miss Stalwart carrying 61.5kg at $6.50. Further improvement to come and can measure up in this line up.

form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last campaign seventh of 9 at Eagle Farm F&M Cl3 November 4 over 1200m, soft track; 2.75 len behind Poster Girl with 56kg at $2.40. On debut favourite; won by 1.2 len this track F&M Mdn October 3 over 1000m defeating Ceekay's Choice carrying 60kg at $1.75. Expecting her to hit the ground running this campaign.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up rolled along in front then was edged out late second last in a small field at this track 3yo Hcp on March 6 over 1200m, on heavy track; 0.8 len behind Silver Smash with 59.5kg at $3.30. Second-up 4th of 9 at this track Bm60 on March 29 over 1000m, slow going 1.75 len behind Little Vista with 60kg at $2.35. Others rate better.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after six months second last of 13 at this track Bm62 on March 29 over 1400m, on a slow track; 8 len behind Bit Of Grunt with 56.5kg at $31. form.formComment: Full-sister to Group 1 winner Port Lockroy. Most recently 5th of 8 at Eagle Farm Bm68 on March 25 over 1000m, 1.75 len behind Impact Zone carrying 55kg at $8.50. The run before that came from midfield and won by 2 len at Warwick Bm58 March 10 over 1100m defeating Sleepy Joe carrying 58.5kg at $4.40. Thereabouts last time out. Can atone.
